text:
J10,000 (, 10000 Jenī) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 129 These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card is the currency for the Greed Island game. It is the same as regular Jenny, but in card form. This is the highest amount a player can get in card form. 

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.607 :: 
G・Iの最高額の紙幣。カード化を解除した場合の形状は国際通貨紙幣と全く同じ。(カード状でないとG・Iでは無価値である)
|-
![Eng]
|No.607 :: 10,000J 
The highest valued currency in Greed Island. When not in its card form, it looks just like a normal bill. (When not in its card form, it is useless on Greed Island). 
|}

Trivia

The card only appears in the manga and the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 74 (1999) 
The manga's version of the card shows a real ¥10,000 (Japanese yen) note (Series D, 1984) obverse image.
